inputs.label: Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Total paintable surface area in square meters

inputs.label: Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Paint coverage rate from manufacturer data sheet (m² per liter)

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of paint coats to apply

inputs.label: Wastage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra paint needed for spillage, uneven surfaces, etc.
